mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO portfolio_permission ( application_id, portfolio_id, is_public ) SELECT #{applicationId}, p.portfolio_id, p.is_public FROM portfolio p WHERE p.portfolio_id IN
#{portfolioId}
mapper.select: SELECT permission_id, application_id, portfolio_id, is_public FROM portfolio_permission WHERE application_id = #{applicationId} ORDER BY permission_id ASC
SELECT portfolio_id FROM portfolio_permission WHERE application_id = #{applicationId} ORDER BY permission_id ASC
